description.value: Price 38,312 gp; Slot none CL 6th; Weight 6 lbs.; Aura moderate transmutation DESCRIPTION This metal +1 klar is shaped like the head of a storm roc, whose sharp feathers serve as the klarâs spikes, and it hums and crackles like a distant stormy sky. When used to make a shield bash attack, a thunder fang deals an additional 1d6 points of sonic damage. In addition, the wielder gains electricity resistance 5. When the wielder confirms a critical hit with a rocâs fang, it unleashes a thunderclap, deafening the target of the critical hit for 1 minute unless that target succeeds at a DC 16 Fortitude saving throw. If the wielder of a thunder fang also wields a roc’s thunder and uses the Thunder and Fang feat, each weapon deals an additional 1d6 points of electricity damage, the DCs to negate their critical hit effects increase by 2, and a creature that fails such a saving throw is also pushed back 10 feet and knocked prone. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 19,312 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells lightning bolt, resist energy, sound burst
